title: Tomfoolery
excerpt: Jenkies, Scooby A town in Minnesota,  Oft abbreviated
body:
Jenkies, Scooby
A town in Minnesota, 
Oft abbreviated

Jenkies, SY
Hometown of a loved one
Often thought of

Ruh Roh, Raggy
Across the state line

No sleep, TN

title: Tomcat
excerpt: Tomcat Or am I?
body:
Tomcat
Or am I? 

Tweety Bird
Or is she?

Mike Jones
Who?
Mike Jones

title: Double Boo and Boring
excerpt: Two more Just two more and then I'm free for new horizons But damn, do I love stalling on the last bit I can't seem to help it Maybe one day
body:
Two more
Just two more and then I'm free for new horizons
But damn, do I love stalling on the last bit
I can't seem to help it
Maybe one day

I want to be free
Yet am terrified at the reality of it

Boo, I say
Double boo and boring
Get on with it already
We're waiting (not so) patiently

No bets on Travhorse today 
He's been out to pasture for weeks

Tomorrow is a new day

title: Wishing for an end
excerpt: Sixty minutes in bed You've been in my head for much longer One of many,  I wish they'd all stop and leave me be
body:
Sixty minutes in bed
You've been in my head for much longer
One of many, 
I wish they'd all stop and leave me be

Why not? 

Is there something I've done to deserve this? 
Do I need to atone via an obscure ritual excavated from a psychedelic shaman's Instagram? 

I wouldn't like it if that was the answer, but I'll do it if it's required
Let me know

Love, 
Travis

title: Timegoeson
excerpt: Time goes on goes time goes On goes time slows on Goes time goes long On time goes wrong Goes times goes on
body:
Time goes on goes time goes
On goes time slows on
Goes time goes long
On time goes wrong
Goes times goes on

Time goes on and on and on
And long and long and long

Signed by time and on the line, 
And on and on and... 

Why?

title: Fkfnfn
excerpt: Fucking, fuckin fuck'n It's happened again
body:
Fucking, fuckin fuck'n
It's happened again

The hours have passed,
I feel them in a dislocated way

Tick 
(Or is it?)
Tock
(Or has it?)

I don't know the difference anymore

Asleep or awake?
Am I?

title: Heart erupts
excerpt: I climb today's route Evermore I see in green  Heart erupts
body:
I climb today's route
Evermore I see in green 
Heart erupts

title: I leave gently
excerpt: I leave gently Paint falls slower than me Splat
body:
I leave gently
Paint falls slower than me
Splat

title: Brain goes brr
excerpt: Eyes see blonde,  Brain goes brr Tongue don't talk,  Brain goes brr Brain in shock,  Heart go brr
body:
Eyes see blonde, 
Brain goes brr
Tongue don't talk, 
Brain goes brr
Brain in shock, 
Heart go brr

Lovely lady scares, 
Familiar that is
Think about her more, 
Equinaminity clipped

Imagine
what could be, 
Help me
have more than what is

title: Sleep now
excerpt: Lay down, quiet your weary head There's a million things and more,  But none of them need right now
body:
Lay down, quiet your weary head
There's a million things and more, 
But none of them need right now

Allow the stillness of night
Return to the dark half, 
The unseen

Worlds await, and visions abound
The symbolism of soul waits to envelope you, Make you at home, Tell you of things already known, 
And tease you towards those not

Infinity in some-odd hours
Affinity in some odd ways

Go,, leap,,, dream, learn, grow 
Move what needs to be
Let settle what should
Sleep now

With me

title: It's time and yet a part of me resists
excerpt: It's time and yet a part of me resists  Titillations arise and whisper softly into my ear,  Not yet, not yet I want to, but the imps say no
body:
It's time and yet a part of me resists 
Titillations arise and whisper softly into my ear, 
Not yet, not yet
I want to, but the imps say no

Look here, and here, and here
Anything to be awake for one minute longer
They can't live in the other half, 
The still

Feed us,
Aren't we interesting? 
Feed us

Still
relativeSourcePath: It's time and yet a part of me resists.md

title: I have an elf living in my house
excerpt: I currently have an elf living in my house,  A little, golden sprite I am blessed and gifted,  If only I have the sight
body:
I currently have an elf living in my house, 
A little, golden sprite
I am blessed and gifted, 
If only I have the sight

I make fun and she does too, 
What a delight
The worrying was all for naught, 
There was no need
relativeSourcePath: I have an elf living in my house.md

title: A reminder to wake up
excerpt: A partner in 3-6 business days Or so say those who speak of the sauna gods Sahhhhh Am I spoken for or am I the one speaking?  My edge unclear and winding
body:
A partner in 3-6 business days
Or so say those who speak of the sauna gods
Sahhhhh
Am I spoken for or am I the one speaking? 
My edge unclear and winding

May I have a peek around the corner, sir?
And may I have another?
I don't want to remember, 
I want to be shown

And another?

Siri, 
Set a reminder for everyday at mine pm to remember why I'm here
And another a few hours later to forget

Siri, 
Set a reminder for me to wake up

title: Pretty bad insomnia
excerpt: Pretty bad insomnia ™️ Past a certain point it's all cheese to me Bemusement turns to frustration turns to discomfort  Cold and restless, aching for relief Adore the thought of ending,  Imagine the peace of morning  Swit
body:
Pretty bad insomnia ™️
Past a certain point it's all cheese to me
Bemusement turns to frustration turns to discomfort 
Cold and restless, aching for relief
Adore the thought of ending, 
Imagine the peace of morning 
Switch it up and do it different, 
There's little point in cycling with no chance
Chance for change, change for a chance
Oh, please, God 
It won't be funny in the morning

title: Is my patience a virtue
excerpt: At times I'm lavished and at others empty In some I'm content though often feel missing My cup overfloweth, yet bone dry are parts that are key I look to the barmaid, but again she passes me
body:
At times I'm lavished and at others empty
In some I'm content though often feel missing
My cup overfloweth, yet bone dry are parts that are key
I look to the barmaid, but again she passes me

Drink what I have to forget what I don't 
Hope that enjoyment of what I have means I won't 
Forget what I'm yearning, and wrapped up tight waiting for
Is my patience a virtue, or do I wait for scraps on the floor?

title: Dont be unlike me
excerpt: Fear of losing my mind creeping like the nightly sleet that never sticks but won't stay away Easier to dissociate and forgot than to feel the potential I'm not sure yet how I'd feel Half of me feels content, another half
body:
Fear of losing my mind creeping like the nightly sleet that never sticks but won't stay away
Easier to dissociate and forgot than to feel the potential
I'm not sure yet how I'd feel
Half of me feels content, another half - somewhat shaded - recoils at the thought
Child to middle aged man to child, no maturation to be had
"I did it to myself" 
I imagine saying
Peace in the responsibility I bear for my own actions
Don't be like me, 
But don't be unlike me
Find a middle path
Moderate

title: Softening
excerpt: Softening, To the ground I fall Burrowing in the stillness and damp Delight at the knowing of nothing
body:
Softening,
To the ground I fall
Burrowing in the stillness and damp
Delight at the knowing of nothing

Emerge,
Erupting at a quickening pace
Elation in the expansion,
Alight in remembering your face

Down, down, down
In, in, in
Up, up, up
Out, out, out

Around,
Alive,
Aflight

title: I won't ask, I'll hope
excerpt: *Feels almost like two? Interesting last stanza albeit feels quite different on the surface *
body:
*Feels almost like two? Interesting last stanza albeit feels quite different on the surface *

Tell me, tell me
On second thought, 
Don't

It's more fun
(And frightening)
To guess and not know

Hold tight to your secrets
Whatever you do, don't 
No matter my asking, 
What I really want's hope



I feel it inside me, 
The glutton for knowing
The guilty of grasping, 
Addicted to showing

Subsumed and controlled, 
At the beck and call of another
Bound by obedience, 
To a devouring mother

title: Not much for texting
excerpt: Not much for texting, I'm not sure how one is I used to be, true When I was a kid
body:
Not much for texting,
I'm not sure how one is
I used to be, true
When I was a kid

There's no place for talking, 
No space for connection
Its empty and lossy
Its full of projection

I don't want to be, 
On a phone the day long
Yes, I can be excited
Good luck, you'd be strong

title: Sun for others
excerpt: I didn't know until she showed me that I did Not a walk in the park, but a run through embers If I could go back, I would But then we'd never have met, would we?
body:
I didn't know until she showed me that I did
Not a walk in the park, but a run through embers
If I could go back, I would
But then we'd never have met, would we?

Is it better to have loved than to have never loved at all if the seeing spoils you?
I fear being the one that got away, and the one that never leaves another's heart despite distance
I'm glad to be the elixir, if not in a world that contains no other

But if there is none?
A sadder life than only one
I'd rather known and have lost the sun, 
Than to have never known it at all

Does the sun wish for us to find its warmth in others?
It's light in our eyes?
It's rhythm in the coming and goings of loved ones?
Should I not long to be the brightness in someone's heart, if only for a moment?

What else is there to be?
What else matters?

title: Loving with abandon
excerpt: If I love knowing that I will lose Will I not get hurt? Will I not slink away and shrink until I'm unable to love again?
body:
If I love knowing that I will lose
Will I not get hurt?
Will I not slink away and shrink until I'm unable to love again?

I fear the hot stove of attachment, 
The recoil and release of affection

I want to love with abandon
But I fear the abandonment of myself in response

How do I protect without preventing? 
I don't know better than God, but I do need to know how

God protects those who protect themselves

title: writing
excerpt: Sitting in vain, or so I call it Sitting and waiting, is inaction a falling? There's reasons, I swear, I know why I do I'm not a slave to beliefs, I don't want it to be true
body:
Sitting in vain, or so I call it
Sitting and waiting, is inaction a falling?
There's reasons, I swear, I know why I do
I'm not a slave to beliefs, I don't want it to be true

At least I'm not fat, a slovenly pig
Taking care of at least one; my body and fit
Am I vain? I swear I am
Do I want to change? It's not my plan
Am I mean? I think it's not so
Is there a chance? Let's fucking go

No compassion for losers,
If losing isn't trying
If losing is excuses,
and self-delusional lying
If losing is acceptance of mediocrity and crying
If losing is accepting the worst of the world and not flying

I want to be good, and I want to be better,
I want to accel and I want to be clever(?)
I pray that I soar, and I pray that I dive
To the depths of myself, and of the world the most high

Am I perfect? No way. Am I awesome? All day.
Do I forget? All the time. Do I remember? When I shine.

title: writing
excerpt: [[Ocean of Boundless Love]], Reaching out to me
body:
[[Ocean of Boundless Love]],
Reaching out to me

Oceans below and above,
Take me in and let me see

Ocean surrounds like a glove,
Fit to God and fit to me

Oceans and oceans of love,
Show me myself and set me free

title: One thing I want to know
excerpt: One thing I want to know Is who you are, And I'm curious if you'll share it
body:
One thing I want to know
Is who you are,
And I'm curious if you'll share it

I want to know the deepest parts,
And love so much,
Overflowing til I can't bear it

Another thing I want to know
Is what you like,
So I can give you more and more

I long to give until you're full
And I've given from my core

How much love do I have to give?
Well, I'm only on the shore
But I reckon I swim into the ocean,
And I'll be setting damn high scores

My love to be will one day see
She chose well marrying me
Rejoice we will and take our fill
How glorious we will be

*Interesting little poem...*
relativeSourcePath: One thing I want to know.md

title: Who are you
excerpt: Who are you,  And what are we to be?  Is it you? Or are there more for me?
body:
Who are you, 
And what are we to be? 
Is it you?
Or are there more for me?

If it's true, 
So much of God we'll see
And if it's not,
I'll wait for godly lead

title: Infini-fuel
excerpt: Infini-fuel Light once, burn forever (Until the end)
body:
Infini-fuel
Light once, burn forever
(Until the end)

Have you always wondered what it would be like to be alive?
Have you yearned for the excruciatingly exciting experience of existence?
Do you have a penchant for pain, and a priority on plurality?
If so, consider Infini-fuel

With only one spark, you (and countless others) can enjoy the multitudes of realities yet untold
Lives so full you'll never know they weren't yours to begin with!
Unimaginable fullness and immensity of sensation,
Indescribable and unending pleasure, pain, and existential amnesia
Best in the universe, guaranteed

Infini-fuel,
When the only thing you desire is that which doesn't exist
Agency?
You created it!
Aloneness?
You escaped it!

Or so you thought...

The ride that never ends.
The gift that keeps on giving.
Infini-fuel.

Just one spark.

title: F. U. C. K. Overthinking
excerpt: F. U. C. K.
body:
F. U. C. K.

Fuck. Overthinking.
Say what now?

Fuck. Overthinking.
Who? What? How?

Fuck. Overthinking.
Fuckover thinking
Fuck worth, I'm thinking

title: Might need a lifeguard
excerpt: I don't want to be swept off of my feet, I don't want to lose my head, I don't want to be uncool, I don't want to admit how much I care I don't want to ride the ride if it's going to end up in a dumpster I only want to i
body:
I don't want to be swept off of my feet,
I don't want to lose my head,
I don't want to be uncool,
I don't want to admit how much I care
I don't want to ride the ride if it's going to end up in a dumpster
I only want to if I end up back into water
I need a seatbelt,
And my arms and legs crossed at all times
Hell, I might need a lifeguard
*Do I have one of those...?*
I climbed three stories to get up here, I might as well take the ride
I always loved Schlitterbahn
The hottest, coolest times in Travis, come plaaaaaay
Schlitterbahn-bahn-bahn

title: Peekaboo
excerpt: If I know... That I am not Travis, That I am the thing behind the character, That I am playing hide-and-seek, That I am waiting for the cosmic "peekaboo!"
body:
If I know...
That I am not Travis,
That I am the thing behind the character,
That I am playing hide-and-seek,
That I am waiting for the cosmic "peekaboo!"

Then,
Why do I wait?
Why do I continue to play?

Is the phrase "wait for the cosmic peekaboo"
Not a metaphor,
But a truth?

Is it my choice to wake-up or is it God's?

Peekaboo!

title: Hide and Seek
excerpt: Am I the bones protruding forth and scaffolding muscle? Am I what becomes lonely when not around others? Am I the words that arise when speaking? Am I the sensations that tell me of the worlds outside and inside? Am I th
body:
Am I the bones protruding forth and scaffolding muscle?
Am I what becomes lonely when not around others?
Am I the words that arise when speaking?
Am I the sensations that tell me of the worlds outside and inside?
Am I the impulses and patterns of thought?
Am I the movement?
Am I the mover?
Am I the moved?
Who am I?

Am I the general orientation?
Am I the flavor?
Am I what makes Travis different than another?

I am told that I am none of those things,
That I am the watcher, the witness, the thing that sees
I believe that, I have experienced it to be true
And,
Who is Travis?
What is to be of Travis if I am not any of what makes a Travis?
What happens to Travis if he's not real and I see myself as not-Travis?

(*Ironically, Not-Travis means that Travis still exists*)

Am I allowed to not be Travis?
Is that okay?

If I am not Travis, then who am I?
I know the answer, but,
	I like playing hide-and-seek...

title: poem
excerpt: I'd forgotten what it's like to be vulnerable to rejection from a romantic other Not a fleeting image of an other, But a just-developed-past-image, now-a-real-person other Someone I've shared myself and been open with -
body:
I'd forgotten what it's like to be vulnerable to rejection from a romantic other
Not a fleeting image of an other,
But a just-developed-past-image, now-a-real-person other
Someone I've shared myself and been open with - to the extent possible in a seven hour period

What if she decides she doesn't like me?
What if she decides she's not ready?
What if my interest is not reciprocated?

I will feel like a fool if I let my hopes up for someone explicitly proclaimed unavailable,
Though I would rather feel a fool and remember this feeling than not, and it remain forgotten
These rusty, cobwebbed corners of mine, long untrodden and left to dreams

title: Poetry
excerpt: Am I broken? Who am I? A storied history of experiences abruptly tied off and topped with a bow One, unchangeable condition Many, ever changing moments
body:
Am I broken?
Who am I?
A storied history of experiences abruptly tied off and topped with a bow
One, unchangeable condition
Many, ever changing moments

If I'm codependent and spongey to my environment, then where am I?
Let's play two truths and one lie

title: Ever-Ripe
excerpt: How do I let it ripen until it's done? Do I believe I should be like Ever-Ripe, the new, genetically modified produce by Dole? Should I have a wax-based coating, preventing me from ever going bad? Can I be treated with a
body: How do I let it ripen until it's done? Do I believe I should be like Ever-Ripe, the new, genetically modified produce by Dole? Should I have a wax-based coating, preventing me from ever going bad? Can I be treated with an anti-microbial wash? What happens to the produce that is genetically modified? To the berries and fruits made larger than life, but lacking in flavor? Nice to look at, but not to eat. Simulacrum; cheap emulations of the real thing. Damned attempts at overcoming the reality of God. Let me be a small berry, the kind picked from a field that while not enough for a bite, is more than enough for ecstasy.

title: Last night at Bonnies
excerpt: Love and disappointment tango bittersweet Questioning what is,  And what had to be Answers elude while guilt holds court
body:
Love and disappointment tango bittersweet
Questioning what is, 
And what had to be
Answers elude while guilt holds court

Life, this moment, in double exposure
The photo refuses to stand still
I hesitate to lead it

Escape eclipsed by hope, 
I'm still here.

title: Can't Sleep, Don't Tell
excerpt: Can't sleep You hold me as my bones begin to ache Tired muscles twitching like a newborn on the edge of sleep Relax, relax, relax into your arms Ow Do I move once more or push farther into the haze of insomnia and incess
body:
Can't sleep
You hold me as my bones begin to ache
Tired muscles twitching like a newborn on the edge of sleep
Relax, relax, relax into your arms
Ow
Do I move once more or push farther into the haze of insomnia and incessant thinking
I need to fart,
Badly
But... I love the warmth of your back,
The tingles your touch evokes as you settle your hand onto another inch of skin
Ugh
One more minute, then I'll go
Will she know I hadn't slept a wink the whole night?
Had she even been able to sleep?
Was I waking her over and over?
You excite like a downed power line in a lake of potentiality,
and yet,
I feel distance in your touch, an uncertainty of what this is,
What you want,
What I want,
Who we even are?
I couldn't begin to begin to begin to answer
In the words of a dear friends,
It's not worth the worry
Alive, interchanging, exchanging, allowing inside, opening myself to another
Yet,
My elbow hurts
The position of my leg in which it lies between yours,
happy,
content
in it's home of vulnerability,
It too hurts
Do I move it?
Can I sleep at all in this pool of warmth and uncertain connection
Am I doomed to sleeplessly enjoy cuddles until the morning sun decides to bid adieu,

*I'm not even sure if that's hello*

playing it's ways across the curves of your face and gracefully blanketed body as I wonder if it was even worth it?
Should I go?
Do tell`

title: Another way
excerpt: Eat me for dinner My souls gone to mourn The way that you looked Some way my soul shook Isn't there another way? Can't there be some way to say? I don't want you I love you, but I don't want you Not now, But not for fore
body:
Eat me for dinner
My souls gone to mourn
The way that you looked
Some way my soul shook
Isn't there another way?
Can't there be some way to say?
I don't want you
I love you, but I don't want you
Not now,
But not for forever
Isn't there some other way?`
